name: Eggless, Milkless Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F.
Boil water (beer), raisins, brown sugar, butter, cinnamon, allspice, and salt for 3 minutes. Cool.
Sift cake flour, double-action baking powder, and baking soda together.
Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the liquid mixture until smooth.
Stir in chopped almonds.
Bake in a greased tube pan for 1 hour or more. Frost with caramel icing.
